body: Hi Priya, saw your Python hiring ramp post-Series B. Would a quick scheduling link help? Reply YES and I will send one. — Tenacious
Hi Marcus, following up on the capacity-preservation note. Can I send over a 20-min slot for this week? Reply YES. — Tenacious
Hi Daniela, congrats again on the new role. Happy to send a short peer benchmark — reply YES for a scheduling link. — Tenacious
Hi Hiroshi, glad the ML platform note resonated. Can I send a 30-min link to compare architecture notes? Reply YES. — Tenacious
Hi Amelie, following up on the capacity-preservation note. Can I send over a 20-min slot for this week? Reply YES. — Tenacious
